'''Shalm''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Mount Ganton]] was located, the highest [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] in its range. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison on the western face of Ganton was abandoned after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], only to become the base of the [[Pendarran's Revenge]], led by [[Kolor Delan]].
